'''vavupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nichification|nichification]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-v-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nichification|nichification]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| vavupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vævipith|vævipith]] || [[word:vævipij|vævipij]] || [[word:vævipish|vævipish]] || [[word:vævipi|vævipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vavuvuputh|vavuvuputh]] || [[word:vavuvupuj|vavuvupuj]] || [[word:vavuvupush|vavuvupush]] || [[word:vavuvupu|vavuvupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vavuputh|vavuputh]] || [[word:vavupuj|vavupuj]] || [[word:vavupush|vavupush]] || [[word:vavupu|vavupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vavufputh|vavufputh]] || [[word:vavufpuj|vavufpuj]] || [[word:vavufpush|vavufpush]] || [[word:vavufpuf|vavufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vavuputhu|vavuputhu]] || [[word:vavupuju|vavupuju]] || [[word:vavupushu|vavupushu]] || [[word:vavupuku|vavupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vavuputh|vavuputh]] || [[word:vavupuj|vavupuj]] || [[word:vavupush|vavupush]] || [[word:vavupu|vavupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vavuputhul|vavuputhul]] || [[word:vavupujul|vavupujul]] || [[word:vavupushul|vavupushul]] || [[word:vavupukul|vavupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vavuputhuthu|vavuputhuthu]] || [[word:vavupujuju|vavupujuju]] || [[word:vavupushushu|vavupushushu]] || [[word:vavupuku|vavupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vavuputhun|vavuputhun]] || [[word:vavupujun|vavupujun]] || [[word:vavupushun|vavupushun]] || [[word:vavupukun|vavupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vavuputhuoro|vavuputhuoro]] || [[word:vavupujuoro|vavupujuoro]] || [[word:vavupushuoro|vavupushuoro]] || [[word:vavupukuoro|vavupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
